allow: Bash(node -e "const {createClient}=require\('@libsql/client'\); const c=createClient\({url:'file:sqlite.db'}\); c.execute\(\\"SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table' ORDER BY name\\"\).then\(r=>{console.log\('Tables:', r.rows.map\(x=>x.name\).join\(', '\)\)}\).catch\(e=>console.error\(e.message\)\)")
